identity.name: @epdoc/fmt
identity.purpose: Factory functions for formatting common data types for display

quickStart.pattern: Import a formatter factory, call with value to format

exports.name: bool
exports.description: Boolean formatter with preset styles and colors
exports.whenToUse: Display true/false values with checkmarks, circles, or text

exports.name: bytes
exports.description: Byte size formatter (B, KiB, MiB, GiB, etc.)
exports.whenToUse: Display memory or disk sizes in human-readable binary units

exports.name: percent
exports.whenToUse: Display ratios or decimals as percentages (0.5 → 50.00%)

exports.name: uptime
exports.whenToUse: Display elapsed times (uptime, age) in compact narrow format

exports.name: BOOL_PRESETS
exports.whenToUse: Access preset configurations for the bool formatter

patterns.name: Custom colors
patterns.when: Matching unit colors to table theme
